texto: When and where there is repression, what a woman does when she gets dressed in the morning may be considered political. Wearing or not wearing a veil, disobeying laws that prohibit transgender dressing, or wearing a large Afro in an institution that seeks to diminish the formation of racial alliances are all actions that can serve as challenges to domination
explicacao: Citação de Maxine Leeds Craig sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When and where there is repression, what a woman does when she gets dressed in the morning may be…” articula reflexao, afro, beauty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e termino.
